summary: Iteration 80: Tested deep-linking and auto-scroll highlight for notifications/alerts. Backend 8/8 tests PASSED. Frontend: Deep-link navigation to /ratings?tab=messages&subtab=alerts&id={alert_id} works correctly. HighlightableItem shows ring-2 ring-blue-400 highlight. Layout dropdown uses correct deep-link with alert_id. MessagesTab key prop forces remount on URL param change.
critical_code_review_comments: MessagesTab.jsx lines 45-70: HighlightableItem component with ref-based scroll and ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2 bg-blue-50/80 scale-[1.01] highlight - WORKING
Ratings.jsx line 2371: key={${searchParams.get('subtab') || 'alerts'}-${searchParams.get('id') || ''}} forces remount - CORRECT
Layout.jsx lines 769-774: Uses notification.action_url first, then builds deep-link with alert_id for operator_alert - CORRECT
subscriptions.py lines 232-233, 249-251: Creates notification with alert_id and action_url containing alert_id - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Created test alerts during testing (TEST_DEEPLINK_Alert_*, TEST_TYPE_Alert_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep-linking for alerts/notifications is fully functional. Customer is subscribed to operator 5b0df280-f792-4ae8-9ad9-c18a8c7dd99e (Royal Events Cameroon). Test alert e48e8a2c-bd05-43df-9f1e-f73dd6c7dd3b can be used for testing. HighlightableItem uses data-item-id attribute and scrollIntoView with 3.5s ring highlight animation.

backend_notification_structure.alert_id_field: alert_id - reference to the alert item

messagestab_key_prop.purpose: Forces remount when URL params change
